mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.AttachingFileMapper.selectAttachingFile */ SELECT ATTACHING_FILE_SEQ /*첨부파일_시퀀스*/ , TARGET_CD /*타겟_코드*/ , TARGET_SEQ /*타겟_시퀀스*/ , FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME /*파일_원본_명*/ , FILE_PATH /*파일_경로*/ , FILE_SIZE /*파일_사이즈*/ , FILE_EXTENSION_NAME /*파일_확장자_명*/ , OPEN_FILE_YN /*공개_파일_여부*/ , USE_YN /*사용_여부*/ , REGISTER_SEQ /*등록자_시퀀스*/ , REGISTER_IP /*등록자_아이피*/ , REGISTRATION_DT /*등록_일시*/ , UPDATER_SEQ /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT /*수정_일시*/ FROM ATTACHING_FILE WHERE ATTACHING_FILE_SEQ = #{attachingFileSeq} AND USE_YN = TRUE

/* com.matjzing.mapper.AttachingFileMapper.getFile */ SELECT ATTACHING_FILE_SEQ /*첨부파일_시퀀스*/ , FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME /*파일_원본_명*/
, TARGET_SEQ /*타겟_시퀀스*/ , CONCAT(#{fileUrlPrefix}, FILE_PATH) as FILE_PATH /*파일_경로*/
, CONCAT(#{fileUrlPrefix}, TARGET_SEQ) as TARGET_SEQ /*타겟_시퀀스*/ , FILE_PATH
, FILE_SIZE /*파일_사이즈*/ , FILE_EXTENSION_NAME /*파일_확장자_명*/ FROM ATTACHING_FILE WHERE USE_YN = TRUE AND TARGET_CD = #{targetCd} AND TARGET_SEQ = #{targetSeq} ORDER BY ATTACHING_FILE_SEQ LIMIT 1
